summary: iOS 🟥 TERN | INTERMITTENT | Primary earbud is not disconnected after placing it in charge case
scenario: Primary earbud remains connected with charging icon after placing in charge case and closing lid on Voyager Free 60+
description_clean: Primary earbud is not disconnected after placing it in the charge case and closing the lid. Steps: pair Free 60 earbuds, place both in case and close, open case and take left earbud first, then right, then place left earbud back in case and close. Observed: primary earbud sometimes still shows as connected with charging icon, and no sound plays through it. Expected: putting earbud in the charge case and closing the lid should disconnect it.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Pair the Poly Free 60 earbuds to the device via Bluetooth.
3. Place both earbuds in the charging case and close the lid.
5. Remove the left earbud from the case first.
6. Remove the right earbud from the case second.
7. Place the left earbud back into the charging case.
expected: The left earbud should disconnect from the device and no longer appear as connected in the Poly Studio Mobile app. No audio should play through the left earbud.
actual: The left earbud sometimes still shows as connected in the Poly Studio Mobile app with a charging icon displayed, and audio continues to play through it.
